summary: Marketing site for Novault, a sleek self-custody multi-chain crypto wallet for mobile and browser, with a dark futuristic aesthetic of vivid gradients and glassy cards.

pages.title: Product
pages.purpose: Home / overview of the Novault self-custody wallet and core value props.

pages.title: Security
pages.purpose: Security architecture: on-device keys, defence layers, audits and comparison.

pages.title: Chains & Features
pages.purpose: Supported networks plus swaps, staking, NFTs, ramps and platform coverage.

pages.title: Pricing
pages.purpose: Plans, transparent swap/ramp fee table and billing FAQ.

pages.title: Download
pages.purpose: Download links, three-step setup, migration and getting-started FAQ.
